page_metadata.biotools__summary: Cocktail is a program for mathematical modelling of bacteriophage (phage) infection kinetics. Cocktail is a Windows 64-bit program and the source code can be developed in the directions that users see fit.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Cocktail is a program for mathematical modelling of bacteriophage (phage) infection kinetics. Cocktail is a Windows 64-bit program and the source code can be developed in the directions that users see fit.
